category_sources: Go package docs for the Bitbucket module describe Uru as a lightweight multi-platform Ruby workflow tool.
source_facts.description says it uses multiple rubies on multiple platforms.
display_name_sources: Official Bitbucket module documentation and RubyInstaller add-on page capitalize the project as Uru.
docs_sources: Bitbucket wiki Downloads is the official project wiki documentation surface; Go package docs mirror the module overview.
source_facts.homepage is the official Bitbucket repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Bitbucket source-control repository.
tags_sources: Go package docs describe Uru as a multi-platform tool for Ruby productivity.
source_facts.description identifies multiple Ruby support across platforms.
